title: The Poems of Mirabai: I Have Found My Lord
description: Mirabai's ecstatic devotional poems to Krishna — the princess who left her palace to sing in the streets.
introduction: Mirabai's ecstatic devotional poems to Krishna — the princess who left her palace to sing in the streets.

translation.text: I have found my Lord. What do I care for the world? They say Mira is mad. Let them say what they will.
